nasb.text: You shall buy food from them with money so that you may eat, and you shall also purchase water from them with money so that you may drink.

esv.text: You shall purchase food from them with money, that you may eat, and you shall also buy water from them with money, that you may drink.

cnv.text: 你們要用銀子向他們買食物吃；也要用銀子向他們買水喝。

ccb.text: 你们吃的、喝的，都要花钱向他们买。
